metadata.description: DUBSAR Marketplace staging — governance for long-running, multi-session AI coding projects. Claude Code is the first integration and requires the local DUBSAR Desktop runtime. Controlled private beta in preparation for Windows; Marketplace not activated or announced. The current vendored plugin is an earlier staging pin and is not the final publication candidate.

plugins.name: scribe-bridge
plugins.description: DUBSAR for Claude Code — thin host adapter for governed Mission continuity, decision memory, evidence and Human Gates across long-running sessions. Requires the local DUBSAR Desktop runtime and private Backend/Core. Historical technical package id: scribe-bridge. Controlled private-beta staging only; not published, production use unsupported, final publication pin not selected.
